full_text:
Jiang Qin (Gongyi) 蔣欽 (公奕)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Qin (蔣欽), styledGongyi (公奕), was born in Shou Chun, Jiu Jiang district (Presently Shou, An Hui Province). Led the volunteer forces that joined Sun Ce in the battle of Qu’e. Jiang Qin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Jiang Qin lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
